name: aws-bb-toolkit
description: Offensive AWS recon and exploitation for authorized bug bounty programs. Atomic skills: aws-iam-enum, aws-s3-recon, aws-secrets-hunt, aws-lambda-recon, aws-ec2-imds-abuse, aws-cred-validator, aws-cloudtrail-pivot. Read-only by design — never modifies the target.

aws_profile.title: AWS CLI profile
aws_profile.description: AWS CLI profile with the target program's authorized credentials.

scope_file.title: Scope file
scope_file.description: Path to a file listing in-scope AWS account IDs / ARN patterns. The toolkit refuses to enumerate anything outside this file.

throttle_seconds.title: Throttle (seconds)
throttle_seconds.description: Minimum seconds between AWS API calls (avoid CloudTrail anomaly detection).

max_calls_per_session.title: Max calls per session
max_calls_per_session.description: Hard cap on AWS calls per session.
